chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 50 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.21. 2. For orders on CMA No.379/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.380/2019. 29.10.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2019 without any progress even notice has not been sought till date. Counsel for the applicant merely seeks time for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
